commands.summary: manual extra 50 g; recipe 200, staple 500, Pantry 100, final 450 g

goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: The grocery/intake slice is implemented and all non-browser gates pass. The final browser attempt proved the PATCH and 50g/450g persistence, then an explicit test reload overlapped the application's reload and aborted navigation. Protected oracles and final hash integrity remain.
deviations: Attempt 1 did not open the rich-intake details before filling.
Attempt 2 lacked synchronization around the manual-extra control.
Attempt 3 proved PATCH 200 and persisted 50g/450g, then failed page.reload with net::ERR_ABORTED due overlapping reloads.
Isolated pnpm build needed PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false for the node_modules junction; webpack build passed.
remaining_blockers: Final mirror/protected hash and diff/status integrity
goalbuddy_receipt_v1.stopped_because: Browser repair allowance exhausted on an overlapping application/test reload race; port released.
